places.name: Bratislava Zen Center (Slovenská zenová škola Kwan Um)
places.notes: Main Kwan Um center in Slovakia. Slovak Kwan Um school established 1990; celebrated 20 years in 2010.

places.name: Košice Zen Center
places.notes: Eastern Slovakia Kwan Um center. Wednesday evening sessions 18:30-20:30.
